title: limonium × erectiflorum
intro: Limonium × erectiflorum, also known as sea lavender or upright sea lavender, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Plumbaginaceae family. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Limonium × erectiflorum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it useful for skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
